scripts.release: npm run release:check && npm run build:prod
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run deps:status
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.js --minify
